page_metadata.bioconda__summary: KAT is a suite of tools that analyse jellyfish hashes or sequence files (fasta or fastq) using kmer counts.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: KAT is a suite of tools that analyse jellyfish hashes or sequence files (fasta or fastq) using kmer counts
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Suite of tools that generate, analyse and compare k-mer spectra produced from sequence files
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Suite of tools that generate, analyse and compare k-mer spectra produced from sequence files
